name: part_008
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'BANG!!' with guest performers Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, Watson Amelia, and IRyS.
Interstitial transition scene titled 'Life is GAME' with tarot card motifs and rhythmic visuals.
Performance of the song 'Bad Apple!!' by Aki Rosenthal.

subtitles.original: 優しく来なよ
subtitles.english: Come at me gently.

subtitles.original: パンチライン聴かせてあげる あぁ
subtitles.english: I'll let you hear the punchline, ah.

subtitles.original: やってから考えな
subtitles.english: Think about it after you do it.

subtitles.original: 私が付いているから あぁ
subtitles.english: Because I'm here with you, ah.

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to be free
subtitles.english: Everybody say I want to be free

subtitles.original: 食らうこのビート吸収 全部黙らす
subtitles.english: Absorb this beat you take, silence them all.

subtitles.original: 目覚ませ 起きろ Wake up Wake up
subtitles.english: Awaken, get up, wake up, wake up.

subtitles.original: 生きてる私
subtitles.english: I am alive.

subtitles.original: ねぇ 生きてる私
subtitles.english: Hey, I am alive.

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ 思い出せ
subtitles.english: I've been choosing since the moment I was born, remember it.

subtitles.original: 私は私だ
subtitles.english: I am myself.

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど何一つもないさ そうじゃないと
subtitles.english: There's not a single impossible thing, that's how it is.

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ 思い出せ
subtitles.english: You've been choosing since the moment you were born, remember it.

subtitles.original: あなたはあなただ
subtitles.english: You are yourself.

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど何一つもないさ そうじゃないの
subtitles.english: There's not a single impossible thing, isn't that right?

subtitles.original: なりたい自分に
subtitles.english: To the self you want to be.

subtitles.original: Against 好き嫌い正直 I don't care フットペダル
subtitles.english: Against likes and dislikes, honestly I don't care, foot pedal.

subtitles.original: Against 好き嫌い正直 I don't care フットペダル
subtitles.english: Against likes and dislikes, honestly I don't care, foot pedal.

subtitles.original:
Bad Apple!!
作曲:Haruka 作詞:ZUN
subtitles.english:
Bad Apple!!
Composed by Haruka, Lyrics by ZUN

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも けだるさが
subtitles.english: Even in the flowing time, a listlessness...

subtitles.original: ほらグルグル回って 私から離れる
subtitles.english: ...is spinning around and around, leaving me.

subtitles.original: 心も見えないわ そう知らない
subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart, I just don't know.

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく 時の隙間に
subtitles.english: Without even moving on my own, in the gaps of time...

subtitles.original: 流され続けて 知らないわ
subtitles.english: ...I continue to be swept away, I don't know.

subtitles.original: 周りのことなど 私は私 それだけ
subtitles.english: The things around me, I am just myself, that's all.

subtitles.original: 夢見てる なにも見てない 語るも無駄な
subtitles.english: I'm dreaming, I'm seeing nothing, it's useless to speak...

subtitles.original: 自分の言葉を
subtitles.english: ...of my own words.

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて疲れるだけよ なにも感じず
subtitles.english: Being sad is just tiring, without feeling anything...

subtitles.original: 過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: ...I should just pass the time.

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉 与えられても 自分の心
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given confusing words, my own heart...

subtitles.original: ただ上の空
subtitles.english: ...is just absent-minded.

subtitles.original: もし私から動くのならば すべて変えるの
subtitles.english: If I were to move on my own, I'd change everything...

subtitles.original: なら黒にする
subtitles.english: ...then I'll make it black.

subtitles.original: こんな自分に未来はあるの こんな世界に
subtitles.english: Is there a future for a self like this? In a world like this...

subtitles.original: 私はいるの
subtitles.english: ...do I exist?

subtitles.original: 今切ないの 今悲しいの 自分のことも
subtitles.english: Now it's painful, now it's sad, even about myself...

subtitles.original: わからないまま
subtitles.english: ...remaining unknown.

subtitles.original: 歩むことさえ疲れるだけよ 人のことなど
subtitles.english: Even walking is just tiring, other people's business...

subtitles.original: 知りもしないわ
subtitles.english: ...I don't even know about.

subtitles.original: こんな私も変われるのなら もし変われるのなら
subtitles.english: If even someone like me can change, if I can change...

subtitles.original: 白になる
subtitles.english: ...I'll become white.

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも けだるさが
subtitles.english: Even in the flowing time, a listlessness...

subtitles.original: ほらグルグル回って 私から離れる
subtitles.english: ...is spinning around and around, leaving me.

subtitles.original: 心も見えないわ そう知らない
subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart, I just don't know.

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく 時の隙間に
subtitles.english: Without even moving on my own, in the gaps of time...

subtitles.original: 流され続けて 知らないわ
subtitles.english: ...I continue to be swept away, I don't know.

subtitles.original: 周りのことなど 私は私 それだけ
subtitles.english: The things around me, I am just myself, that's all.

subtitles.original: 夢見てる なにも見てない 語るも無駄な
subtitles.english: I'm dreaming, I'm seeing nothing, it's useless to speak...

subtitles.original: 自分の言葉を
subtitles.english: ...of my own words.

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Being sad is just tiring.
